title: Mould King Super Sports Car Sanna Building Blocks Sets, 1:12 Scale MOC Racing Car Building Kit, Collectible Set for Adults, Super Car Model for Car Lover, Boy Toys Birthday Gift(1182 Pcs), Red
features: 【Mould King 10007 MOC Sanna Car】This sports car building block kits is assembled from 1182 building block parts and has colorful paper instructions to help you easily assemble it. This building block kit compatible with mainstream building blocks. All parts are easy to assemble and will not fall apart.

【1:12 Scale Highly Restored Details】Mould King sport car sets contains many realistic details. Such as electroplating exhaust pipe and built-in simulation engine. Designed specifically for supercar fans. The perfect gift for car lovers and future engineers!

【Premium Quality Material】Mould King Model Car Kits made from child-friendly ABS materials and tested for quality control to ensure compliance with child safety standards. No smell, no burr, smooth and eco-friendly. You can assemble with confidence and safety.

【Car Lover Collectibles and Decorative】The car building kit is a cool model toy, sports car models kits to build for adults, a new set that can be added as a collectible. Its structure is stable, exquisite appearance. Great decorative piece for your bedroom, study room or office area.

【Gift Box Packed】Mould King Race Car Building Toys can provide immersive, easy to put together experience. Perfect for adults and boys girls as a great gift for Christmas, New Year, Christmas, birthday, summer camp, easter, children's day, STEM.
